meta.note: Scores and baselines are REAL % DAMAGE (D = 100*ln(multiplier)); goldPerDamage is gold per 1% damage. Closed-form per-tier values are exact (source of truth for verdicts). Throughput block is a documented reconstruction (see METHODOLOGY.md); the deployed page's tier EVs were SAMPLED with a non-uniform partition sampler and run ~10-30% lower than this uniform-over-partitions closed-form core.
